title: Funder->institution->effort network visualization (no ranking)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). A read-only funder->institution->effort network visualization over the exports presents structure without any ranking/scorecard.
objective: Build a read-only funder->institution->effort network visualization over the published exports, with no ranking and every element traceable to its source.
acceptanceCriteria: Funder->institution->effort network visualization built read-only over the published exports.
No ranking/scorecard encoded (node size/order not presented as quality); every element traceable to its source.
output: explorer/network-viz/ network visualization, committed via PR.
